app.title: Fire Tools
app.disclaimer: Fire Tools - Aviso: esta herramienta tiene fines educativos. Los datos de mercado se proporcionan de forma orientativa y pueden estar retrasados o ser inexactos. Consulta con un asesor financiero para obtener consejo profesional.

home.aboutBody: FIRE Tools te ayuda a planificar y alcanzar la independencia financiera y la jubilación anticipada. Nuestra suite de calculadoras ofrece análisis basados en datos para decisiones financieras informadas.
home.disclaimerBody: Estas herramientas tienen fines educativos y de planificación. Consulta siempre a un asesor financiero cualificado o realiza tu propia investigación antes de tomar decisiones de inversión.
home.securityTitle: Aviso de seguridad: despliegue en GitHub Pages
home.securityWarningBody: Esta aplicación está desplegada en GitHub Pages, que no admite almacenamiento del lado del servidor ni cookies HTTP-only. Aunque los datos están cifrados con AES, siguen siendo vulnerables a ataques XSS y otros exploits del lado del cliente que podrían exfiltrar tus datos financieros.
home.securityRecommendBody: Te recomendamos encarecidamente desplegar esta aplicación localmente en tu equipo. El despliegue local ofrece mejor aislamiento y reduce la superficie de ataque.

assetAllocation.title: Gestor de asignación
assetAllocation.body: Administra tu cartera con herramientas inteligentes de asignación, estrategias de reequilibrio y asistente DCA.

cashflow.title: Tracker de flujo de caja
cashflow.body: Controla ingresos y gastos, establece presupuestos por categoría y analiza tus hábitos con la regla 50/30/20.

netWorth.title: Tracker de patrimonio
netWorth.body: Controla tus operaciones financieras y patrimonio neto mes a mes. Supervisa activos, efectivo, pensiones y progreso hacia FIRE.

fireCalculator.title: Calculadora FIRE
fireCalculator.body: Calcula tu camino hacia la independencia financiera con proyecciones completas y análisis detallado de tu cronograma de jubilación.

monteCarlo.title: Simulaciones Monte Carlo
monteCarlo.body: Ejecuta miles de simulaciones con rendimientos aleatorios para evaluar la probabilidad de alcanzar FIRE considerando la volatilidad.

quiz.title: Quiz Persona FIRE
quiz.body: Descubre tu persona FIRE y obtén recomendaciones personalizadas según tu situación financiera, objetivos y tolerancia al riesgo.

settings.languageHelp: Elige el idioma de la interfaz. No afecta a la divisa.
settings.accountNameHelp: Este nombre se mostrará en toda la aplicación
settings.aiCategorizationHelp: Conecte cualquier punto de conexión compatible con OpenAI — nube (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, OpenRouter, Together…) o un modelo de código abierto autoalojado a través de Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM, etc. Para la categorización completamente local, apunte la URL base a p. ej. http://localhost:11434/v1, deje la clave API como cualquier cadena no vacía y use un modelo ya descargado (llama3.1:8b, qwen2.5, …).
settings.aiCategorizationStoredHelp: Almacenado cifrado junto con el resto de sus configuraciones. Solo se usa cuando marca «Usar categorización IA» en el diálogo de importación de PDF.
settings.assetPricesDescription: Precios de mercado actuales para los activos de su cartera. Los precios pueden estar retrasados.
settings.categoriesDescription: Gestione sus categorías de gastos. Cree categorías personalizadas o personalice las predeterminadas.

confirm.clearNotifications: Are you sure you want to clear all notifications? This cannot be undone.
confirm.loadDemo: This will overwrite your current data with demo data. Are you sure you want to continue?
confirm.resetAll: Are you sure you want to reset ALL data? This will clear all saved data from cookies and cannot be undone.

settings.dateFormatHelp: Cómo se muestran las fechas en la aplicación
settings.dcaInvestmentRemindersHelp: Recordar las aportaciones periódicas a inversiones
settings.decimalPlacesHelp: Número de decimales que se muestran para valores inferiores a 1.000. Los valores iguales o superiores a 1.000 no muestran decimales.
settings.defaultCurrencyHelp: Esta moneda se usará como predeterminada en todas las páginas
settings.demoDataHelp: Cargar datos de muestra para explorar la aplicación
settings.documentationHelp: Ver la documentación y los recursos de soporte
settings.exportAllDataHelp: Exporte todos sus datos en un solo archivo o como archivos separados
settings.fallbackRatesDescription: These rates are used when the live exchange rate API is unavailable. All values convert to {{currency}} (the default currency).
settings.fireAssetClassesHelp: Activar/desactivar qué clases de activos se cuentan en el valor de su cartera FIRE
settings.fireMilestoneAlertsHelp: Recibir notificaciones al alcanzar hitos FIRE (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
settings.fireQuestionnaireHelp: Volver a completar el cuestionario para actualizar su perfil FIRE y recomendaciones
settings.guidedTourHelp: Reiniciar el recorrido guiado para conocer las funciones de Fire Tools
settings.importAllDataHelp: Importe todos los datos desde un único archivo JSON. Los datos se convertirán a su moneda actual.
settings.importIndividualFilesHelp: Importe datos desde archivos CSV/JSON individuales para cada herramienta.

messages.defaultCurrencyChanged: Default currency changed to {{currency}}! All values converted.
messages.ratePositive: Rate must be a positive number
messages.testNotificationsCreated: {{count}} test notifications created! Check the notification bell.

settings.newMonthRemindersHelp: Recordar actualizar los datos financieros al comienzo de cada mes
settings.pdfImportHelp: Analice localmente recibos, facturas, extractos bancarios y nóminas. Sin llamadas de red a menos que active la categorización IA, que puede apuntarse a un modelo de código abierto autoalojado para que nada salga de su equipo.
settings.portfolioBreakdownHelp: Habilitar la página Desglose de cartera en la navegación
settings.primaryResidenceHelp: Controla si su residencia principal cuenta para el objetivo FIRE
settings.privacyModeHelp: Difuminar los datos financieros sensibles en pantalla para mayor privacidad
settings.reportBugHelp: Informar errores, problemas de interfaz o errores de cálculo
settings.reportSecurityIssueHelp: Informar vulnerabilidades de seguridad de forma privada
settings.searchThresholdHelp: Los menús desplegables con esta cantidad de elementos o más mostrarán un cuadro de búsqueda
settings.testModeHelp: Crear notificaciones de muestra para probar la interfaz de notificaciones
settings.title: Settings
settings.uxUiSuggestionHelp: Sugerir mejoras a la interfaz de usuario o la experiencia de uso

assetAllocation.description: Manage and visualize your portfolio asset allocation. Set target allocations, track current positions, and see recommended actions to rebalance your portfolio.

continent.description: For stocks, derived from the ISIN country prefix. For ETFs, derived from the fund name (e.g. an "MSCI World" ETF maps to Global).
continent.title: By Continent

currency.description: Distribution of holdings by the currency they were originally entered in.
currency.title: By Currency

etfProvider.description: The fund family / issuer inferred from the fund name (e.g., Vanguard, iShares). Direct stock holdings are grouped under "Direct holding".
etfProvider.title: By ETF Provider

holding.description: Each individual asset as a share of the portfolio.
holding.title: By Holding

market.description: The listing exchange for each holding (e.g., NASDAQ, LSE, Xetra).
market.title: By Market

region.description: Finer-grained region (e.g., Western Europe, East Asia, Emerging Markets) derived from ISIN country (stocks) or fund name (ETFs).
region.title: By Region

sector.description: Individual stocks use their listed sector from Yahoo Finance. ETFs use a sector label inferred from their fund name (e.g. "Technology", "Government Bonds"), as Yahoo no longer exposes per-ETF holdings without authentication.
sector.title: By Sector

portfolioBreakdown.emptyPrefix: Your portfolio is empty. Add assets in the
portfolioBreakdown.noTickers: None of your assets have a ticker symbol, so only the Currency and Holding breakdowns are available. Add tickers in the Asset Allocation Manager to unlock sector, region, market, and provider breakdowns.

portfolioBreakdown.subtitle: Slice your current portfolio across multiple dimensions to understand concentration risk, diversification, and exposure. Data is read from your saved Asset Allocation; for ETFs and individual stocks, additional metadata is fetched from Yahoo Finance.
portfolioBreakdown.title: Portfolio Breakdown

monteCarlo.pageDescription: Ejecute múltiples simulaciones con rendimientos de mercado aleatorios para evaluar la probabilidad de alcanzar el FIRE. Esto le ayuda a comprender el rango de resultados potenciales y la probabilidad de éxito bajo diferentes condiciones de mercado.
monteCarlo.sectionDescription: Ejecute múltiples simulaciones con rendimientos de mercado aleatorios para evaluar la probabilidad de alcanzar el FIRE.
monteCarlo.fixValidationReturn: Por favor, regrese al Calculador FIRE para corregir estos problemas.

baseData.title: Datos base de la simulación
baseData.subtitle: Datos del Calculador FIRE utilizados en las simulaciones
baseData.stopWorkingAtFIRE: Dejar de trabajar en el FIRE
baseData.note: Estos valores se cargan desde el Calculador FIRE. Para modificarlos, vaya a la página <1>Calculador FIRE</1>.

params.blackSwanProb: Probabilidad de cisne negro (% por año)

validation.fixErrors: Por favor, corrija los errores de validación antes de ejecutar las simulaciones
validation.numSimulationsMin: Se requieren mínimo 1.000 simulaciones para significancia estadística
validation.numSimulationsMax: Se permiten máximo 100.000 simulaciones por rendimiento
validation.stockVolatilityMin: La volatilidad de acciones debe ser mayor que 0%
validation.bondVolatilityMin: La volatilidad de bonos debe ser mayor que 0%
validation.bondVolatilityMax: La volatilidad de bonos debe ser menor que la volatilidad de acciones ({{value}}%)
validation.blackSwanProbMin: La probabilidad mínima es del 0,1% por año
validation.blackSwanImpactPositive: El impacto debe ser negativo o cero (representa una pérdida)
validation.blackSwanImpactMin: El impacto no puede ser menor que -50% (representa una pérdida máxima del 50%)

monteCarlo.fixErrorsAria: Corrija los errores de validación para ejecutar las simulaciones

status.blankRowsDetected_other: Detected {{count}} rows but every amount is 0 — looks like a blank template. Fill the amounts in and re-upload, or edit each row below before importing.

dataChoice.greatOverview: Great! You've seen an overview of Fire Tools.
dataChoice.existingData: You have existing data in the app.
dataChoice.demoDataLoaded: We've loaded demo data so you can explore.
dataChoice.question: What would you like to do?

interactivePrompt.title: Recorrido interactivo
interactivePrompt.description: Would you like a hands-on walkthrough of each page? We'll guide you through the key features and show you how everything works.
interactivePrompt.stepByStep: We'll walk you through each tool step by step.

welcome.title: Welcome to Fire Tools!
welcome.paragraph1Start: Welcome! Fire Tools is a comprehensive suite of financial planning tools designed to help you achieve
welcome.paragraph2: This quick tour will show you the main features and how to get the most out of the application. We'll also load some demo data so you can see everything in action.
welcome.privacyNote: All your data stays on your device - we never send it anywhere.

assetAllocation.title: Asset Allocation Manager
assetAllocation.strong: Track and manage your investment portfolio

features.addAssets: Add stocks, bonds, ETFs, and other assets
features.targets: Set target allocations and see rebalancing recommendations
features.dca: Use the DCA (Dollar Cost Averaging) helper for regular investments

cashflow.title: Cashflow Tracker
cashflow.text: to understand your spending patterns and savings rate.

features.log: Log income and expenses by category
features.analytics: View charts and analytics of your spending

netWorth.title: Net Worth Tracker
netWorth.strong: Track your financial progress over time
netWorth.text: with monthly snapshots of your net worth.

features.monitor: Monitor assets, cash, and pension accounts
features.charts: See historical charts of your wealth growth
features.sync: Sync with Asset Allocation for consistency

fireCalculator.title: FIRE Calculator
fireCalculator.strong: Calculate your path to Financial Independence
fireCalculator.text: with detailed projections and timeline analysis.

features.projections: Visual projections of your net worth over time
features.reachFire: See exactly when you can reach FIRE
features.scenarios: Adjust parameters to see different scenarios

monteCarlo.title: Monte Carlo Simulations
monteCarlo.strong: Assess the probability of reaching your FIRE goals
monteCarlo.text: by running thousands of simulations with randomized market returns.

features.volatility: Account for market volatility and black swan events
features.outcomes: Understand the range of possible outcomes

together.title: Tools Work Together
together.strong: The real power comes from using FIRE tools together, but each tool can also work independently!
together.assetValues: Asset values flow into FIRE Calculator
together.netWorthSync: Net Worth syncs with Asset Allocation

initialSavings.title: Initial Savings
initialSavings.description: Enter your current savings or portfolio value. This is your starting point for FIRE calculations.

annualIncome.title: Annual Income
annualIncome.description: Enter your annual net labor income. This determines how much you can save each year toward FIRE.

annualExpenses.title: Annual Expenses
annualExpenses.description: Set your current annual expenses. Lower expenses mean a faster path to FIRE!

withdrawalRate.title: Withdrawal Rate
withdrawalRate.description: The withdrawal rate (typically 3-4%) determines your FIRE target. A 4% rate means you need 25x your annual expenses.

integrationOptions.title: Integration Options
integrationOptions.description: These options connect tools together: sync portfolio values from Asset Allocation, or use actual income/expenses from Cashflow Tracker for more accurate calculations.

fireMetrics.title: FIRE Metrics
fireMetrics.description: See your FIRE target, years to FIRE, and projected portfolio value. These are your key milestones!

growthCharts.title: Growth Charts
growthCharts.description: Visualize your journey! The Net Worth Growth chart shows your portfolio over time, and Income vs Expenses shows your cash flow.

yourAssets.title: Your Assets
yourAssets.description: This table shows your portfolio holdings. You can see each asset's current value, target allocation, and recommended action (BUY/SELL/HOLD).

addNewAssets.title: Add New Assets
addNewAssets.description: Click the "Add Asset" button to add a new holding to your portfolio. Go ahead, click it now!

assetClassSelection.title: Asset Class Selection
assetClassSelection.description: First, choose the asset class (Stocks, Bonds, Cash, Crypto, or Real Estate). This determines how the asset is categorized in your portfolio.

assetDetails.title: 🏷️ Asset Details
assetDetails.description: Enter the asset name, ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, VTI), number of shares you own, and the price per share. The total value is calculated automatically.

targetAllocation.title: Target Allocation
targetAllocation.description: Set your target allocation mode: "%" for percentage of the asset class, "SET" for a fixed amount, or "OFF" to exclude from rebalancing.

targetAllocations.title: Target Allocations
targetAllocations.description: Set your target percentages for each asset class. The tool calculates what to buy or sell to reach your targets.

dcaHelper.title: 💹 DCA Helper
dcaHelper.description: The DCA (Dollar Cost Averaging) Helper calculates how to split a lump sum investment. Click the "DCA Helper" button to see how it works!

enterInvestmentAmount.title: Enter Investment Amount
enterInvestmentAmount.description: Enter the amount you want to invest. The DCA Helper will calculate how to split it across your assets according to your target allocations.

investmentBreakdown.title: Investment Breakdown
investmentBreakdown.description: After calculating, you'll see exactly how much to invest in each asset and how many shares to buy. Current prices are fetched from Yahoo Finance.

confirm.title: ✅ Confirm
confirm.description: After making your investments, you can confirm the actual shares purchased to track deviations from the suggested amounts.

addIncome.title: Add Income
addIncome.description: Track your income and expenses here. Click "Add Income" to see how to add income!

dateAmount.title: 📅 Date & Amount
dateAmount.description: Select the date when you received the income and enter the amount. This helps track your income over time.

incomeSource.title: Income Source
incomeSource.description: Choose the income source: Salary, Bonus, Dividend, Freelance, Investment, Rental, or Other. This categorizes your income for better analytics.

addExpense.title: 💸 Add Expense
addExpense.description: Now click "Add Expense" to see how to record your spending.

expenseDetails.title: 📅 Expense Details
expenseDetails.description: Enter the date, amount, and a description of the expense. Be specific to help you track spending patterns.

categoryType.title: 🏷️ Category & Type
categoryType.description: Select a category (Housing, Food, Transport, etc.) and classify as Need or Want. This powers the 50/30/20 budget analysis.

budgetRule.title: 50/30/20 Budget Rule
budgetRule.description: See how your spending compares to the 50/30/20 rule: 50% for needs (housing, food), 30% for wants (entertainment), and 20% for savings.

setBudgets.title: Set Budgets
setBudgets.description: Click the Budgets tab to set monthly spending limits for each category. Track your progress with visual indicators.

budgetCategories.title: Budget Categories
budgetCategories.description: Here you can set monthly budget limits for each expense category. The progress bars show how much you've spent vs. your budget. Edit the amounts to customize your spending goals.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Click the Analytics tab to see spending trends, category breakdowns, and monthly comparisons to help you understand your financial habits.

spendingInsights.title: Spending Insights
spendingInsights.description: View detailed charts and analytics: spending trends over time, category breakdowns, and monthly comparisons. Use the view selector to switch between monthly, quarterly, and yearly perspectives.

logAssets.title: Log Assets
logAssets.description: Just like in Asset Allocation, you can add assets here to track your historical net worth. Click "Log Asset" to add stocks, bonds, crypto, real estate, and other holdings with their current values.

logOperations.title: Log Operations
logOperations.description: Click "Log Operation" to track financial operations like dividends, purchases, and sales.

operationDetails.title: 📅 Operation Details
operationDetails.description: Select the date and operation type: Dividend, Purchase, Sale, Deposit, Withdrawal, Interest, or Tax.

amountDescription.title: Amount & Description
amountDescription.description: Enter the amount and a description. Income operations (dividends, interest) increase your net worth; expenses (taxes) decrease it.

historicalChart.title: Historical Chart
historicalChart.description: Watch your wealth grow over time! The chart shows your net worth progression with monthly variations and forecasted growth.

assetAllocationSync.title: Asset Allocation Sync
assetAllocationSync.description: Enable sync to automatically keep your asset data consistent between Net Worth Tracker and Asset Allocation Manager.

baseData.title: Simulation Base Data
baseData.description: This section shows the FIRE Calculator data used for simulations: your portfolio value, FIRE target, income, savings rate, and expected returns. These values come from your FIRE Calculator inputs.

parameters.title: Simulation Parameters
parameters.description: Adjust the simulation settings: number of simulations (1000-100000), stock/bond volatility (higher = more uncertain), and black swan event probability. These affect how conservative or optimistic your projections are.

runSimulation.title: ▶️ Run Simulation
runSimulation.description: Click the "Run Simulations" button to run the Monte Carlo analysis. This will generate thousands of scenarios based on your parameters.

results.title: Results & Success Rate
results.description: See your success probability, median outcome, and the range of possible results. Green means high probability of success!

logs.title: Simulation Logs
logs.description: After running simulations, you can view detailed logs showing the yearly breakdown of each simulation, including returns, expenses (adjusted for inflation), and portfolio values. Export the logs as CSV or JSON for further analysis.

tables.calculatedValueTitle: El valor actual se calcula a partir de participaciones × precio por participación

charts.startTrackingNetWorth: Comience a registrar su patrimonio neto para ver el gráfico histórico.
charts.netWorthChartAriaLabel: Gráfico del crecimiento del patrimonio neto a lo largo del tiempo
charts.incomeExpensesChartAriaLabel: Gráfico comparativo de ingresos y gastos a lo largo del tiempo
charts.noMonthlyData: No hay datos mensuales para mostrar. Añada transacciones para ver la comparación.
charts.noExpenseData: No hay datos de gastos para mostrar. Añada gastos para ver el desglose.
charts.noTrendData: No hay datos de tendencia para mostrar. Añada transacciones en varios meses para ver las tendencias.
charts.noCategoryData: No hay datos por categoría para mostrar.

dataManagement.title: Gestión de Datos
dataManagement.loadDemoAriaLabel: Cargar datos de gasto demo para el año actual
dataManagement.exportAriaLabel: Exportar datos de la calculadora a archivo {{format}}
dataManagement.importAriaLabel: Importar datos de la calculadora desde archivo {{format}}
dataManagement.resetAriaLabel: Restablecer todos los datos de la calculadora a los valores predeterminados

demo.message: Estás explorando una demo en vivo con datos de muestra: nada de lo que cambies aquí se guarda.
